title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VI. UNIFORM COLLABORATIVE FAMILY LAW ACT

§377. Short title

            This Part may be cited as the Uniform Collaborative Family Law Act.

            Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.

PART VI.  UNIFORM COLLABORATIVE FAMILY LAW ACT
§377.  Short title
This Part may be cited as the Uniform Collaborative Family Law Act.
Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
